item.title: Qatar says Iran didn’t warn of missile attacks, no comms with Tehran
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Qatar's Ministry of Foreign Affairs says there is currently no communication between Doha and Tehran.
Matched: ministry(+2), war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Maritime insurers cancel war risk cover in Gulf: Will it spike energy cost?
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Insurers announced they were cancelling war risk coverage after the IRGC said the Strait of Hormuz was 'closed'.
Matched: war(+3), economy(+2), ai(+3)
